---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Elves
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Elves doesn't currently support well? Describe the situation.

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives you've considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Did they work?

## Which part of Elves does this affect?

- [ ] Core loop (Orient / Implement / Validate / Review / Document)
- [ ] Survival guide / Execution log / Plan templates
- [ ] Preflight checks
- [ ] Review step
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] Compaction recovery
- [ ] Subagent strategy
- [ ] README / documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Anything else — links to related tools, examples from other skills, your specific use case.
